summary: Markets are cautiously optimistic today with crypto showing resilience after recent volatility, while gold and oil trade in tight ranges amid mixed macro cues. Equities sentiment is broadly constructive but with selective risk‑on flows into tech and large‑caps.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Expects pullback to $65,500 liquidity zone as a trap before loading up for 72H bounce.
signals.chart_pattern: liquidity trap, scam wicks, order blocks

signals.name: Pendle
signals.reason: Hunting scam wicks and order blocks to front-run market makers for the bounce.

signals.reason: Targeting entry zones on scam wicks and order blocks ahead of the 72H bounce.

signals.name: Virtual Protocol
signals.reason: Positioning for liquidity grab bounce by front-running market makers on key levels.

signals.name: NEAR Protocol
signals.reason: Exact entry zones identified for longing during the upcoming Bitcoin liquidity trap bounce.

signals.name: World Liberty Financial
signals.reason: Set to print on scam wicks and order blocks during Bitcoin's 72H bounce setup.

signals.name: XRP

signals.source: Crypto market analysis – March 9, 2026 (Capital Street FX)

signals.name: Chainlink
signals.reason: LINK is consolidating after a recent pullback, with no strong directional bias emerging yet from major technical levels.

signals.name: Hyperliquid
signals.reason: HYPE remains a niche‑listed token with limited mainstream coverage, showing choppy price action and no clear consensus view today.

signals.name: Apple
signals.reason: Apple continues to benefit from strong services growth and AI‑related optimism, supporting a constructive medium‑term outlook.

signals.name: Nvidia
signals.reason: Nvidia remains a core AI‑themed holding with robust earnings momentum and strong institutional demand despite stretched valuations.

signals.name: Alphabet (Google)
signals.reason: Alphabet’s diversified revenue base and improving cloud profitability support a positive bias despite regulatory scrutiny.

signals.name: Gold
signals.reason: Gold is holding near recent highs as safe‑haven demand and expectations of slower Fed tightening support prices.
signals.source: Live gold and BTC update (9 May 2026)

signals.name: Brent Crude Oil
signals.reason: Brent is trading in a narrow band as supply concerns are offset by worries over global demand and inventory data.
